title: Year 9 Science: Environmental Impact Story
subject: Science
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of science concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern science challenges
Analyze environmental impacts through science frameworks
Engage with community perspectives on science issues
activities: Traditional knowledge workshop and science integration
Community interview project on science applications
Cultural artifact study through science lens
resources: Cultural knowledge databases and science resources
Traditional knowledge holders and science experts
Environmental monitoring tools and science software
Community engagement platforms and science forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and science models
assessment: Sustainability solution design with science principles
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications
